reviews.review_description: I've played this game a couple times on Playstation without VR, but now that I'm playing on a quest 3, it feels much more immersive! I'll never get tired of the long dialogs of comedy that even makes Justin Roiland himself break character and start laughing. This game will always be one of my favorites <3
Funniest game I’ve ever played. 100% recommend.
This game is quite literally just Rick and Morty vr. The dialogue was good, and the story was amazing with the twists.
I thought it would be bad but when I got it I was so fun and the people in the game are funny.

I really enjoyed Rick and Morty so I gave this a try. All though an Interesting concept as you control the main character and you are also part of the game while seated on a couch it lacks any real gameplay that keeps you engaged and at many points it’s hard to navigate and to know what to do next. Definitely disappointing!

I was worried buying the game because of reviews but it works perfectly and on top of that it's an awesome game!! I'm really hoping for a sequel the gameplay is perfect and it's entertaining as hell!!!
Game's okay,  but Justin Roiland certainly loves to hear himself talk... Or whoever produced this game.  Found myself muting it after a few chapters in. Funny, but where do you draw the line?

The main menu and pause/settings menu are completely broken. Black screen. There is no contact available to the developer. While it looks like a promising game and you can bypass the main menu by pressing A a couple of times, the missing pause menu is a bit of an issue. This app should actually not be available for sale without an update.

I was hesitant to buy this game because of a “black screen bug” that was going around but bought it anyway. I had no issues and have made it too the third world I’ve booted up the game several times and everything works well I’m on meta quest 3s btw. this humor and art style never gets old for me if you’re a fan of Rick and morty or high on life I’d recommend it it’s a lot of fun and it’ll give you a good laugh
Fun game until It stopped working. I paid over $30 for a broken game I can’t return. Please fix your game or send me a refund.

reviews.review_title: New version of meta quest may not work
reviews.review_description: This game started off funny and worked well. As I got to the second world, the game started acting weird on my 3s. I restarted the game and the main menu stopped showing up. It still worked as if it was there tho so if you press a twice it gets you to the game where you left off and can see it. When you try to pause and and see the little green babies or any menu the entire screen goes black and you can’t see anything. I wouldn’t recommend this for a newer version of the quest.

reviews.review_title: Super fun, but the menu is totally blank
reviews.review_description:
I’m really enjoying Trover Saves the Universe—it’s hilarious and plays great on the Quest 3. But there’s a big issue: the menu doesn’t show up at all. Just a blank screen. Luckily, if you press A a bunch of times, the game will start, and you can still play. Same thing when you exit—just keep pressing A, and it’ll load your last save.

The game itself is awesome, but the broken menu is super annoying. Hope they fix it soon!

I wanna say first of all that the game is absolutely hilarious, it's that weird kind of humour from Rick and Morty that works really well for VR (the characters making me out as the worst person in the universe when all I did was own two dogs never gets old), however I've come across a recent problem that I can't actually fix. The main menu is stuck on a black screen that doesn't go away. The menu music will still play, and pressing the buttons makes the sounds they should when pressing options or new game for example, but aside from that I literally can't play the game because of this issue. I've restarted the headset and even uninstalled and reinstalled the game but that hasn't worked. Any help to sort this out would be great since I wanna continue playing and see what other kind of mess and chaos I can cause.

Great game, played it previously on a desktop, so needed to play again in VR.

The game could really benefit from a higher resolution upgrade for Quest3 users.

Latest Quest update causes the start menu screen to black out. Impossible to play. Even if you managed to blindly find the start button in the dark, all the game menus are black too. 

Justin, if you’re still working on these games, they need updating 😮‍💨🙏

This game was so awesome I loved it I remember playing this on the PS4 the Rick and Morty fans needs to play this. Deserve five stars 
￼￼

Wild antics shine through with this gem, good puzzles and funny commentary keep entertaining.

Some hard choices will have you guessing the right morals but these can’t be taken too seriously.

Classic Roiland twist on a 3D platform that gives good laughs and gameplay. 
Save all the power babies.

Game is great. The black screen bug when trying to use menus is unbearable and it a no go! Could revamp the graphics for the quest3 users or reduce the price to 3.99 or something similar otherwise your very potent franchise might just die overnight... started great but not looking like you care  ... serious gamer since 80's saying it not trolling... fix it up and add some free update with a bonus mission or mini game... might contain some very little product placements.... Just saying...
Peace

reviews.review_title: One of the games I always recommend
reviews.review_description:
When asked by others what games they should get, I always recommend this one as my top three! 
The graphics are amazing; the collectible aspect adds to the engagement; there's a lot of game play hours; and it's by far the most humorous game out there. 
If you are reading this and have a fluent sense of humor, GO GET THIS GAME!
I love the game. My previous rating was my error. Five stars!

When I booted it up I was met with a black screen and had to keep rebooting, finally after hitting all the buttons I somehow managed to get in but and it’s a biggie! You can’t access and menu screen and a second screen that I’m unsure if it’s important to the game or not but it appears to be an upgrade screen that you can not access so… stuck with click turning, basically stuck with what ever settings you get as a default which always caters to newbs! What I did see seemed ok but again the unknown annoys me too much as I feel I’m missing important factors with all the menus broken! It’ can’t be that difficult to fix! Fix it! I wouldn’t buy until! We deserve better if you want our money, simple! Sick to death of broken half assed VR!

As far as game play goes, Trover is like every run and jump game since Donkey Kong.  It does it as well as any of this genre (Max Mustard, Lucky's Tale, etc) but with "Rick and Morty" vulgarity and dark/absurd humor - not a big draw for me.  But I enjoyed playing it for an hour or so.   Still, it is VERY broken so I am returning it.

reviews.review_title: Funniest VR Game But Black Screen
reviews.review_description: I played Trover on PSVR a few years ago and wanted to have this in my Quest "collection," but this version just presents a black screen. I'd say don't buy it right now until you see a review that says this is resolved.

reviews.review_title: Main Menu is a Black Screen
reviews.review_description:
I was really looking forward to playing this game but unfortunately, after the opening unreal and squanch videos play,  the Main Menu just appears as a black screen. I can hear the opening music and the sounds of me moving my cursor around but I don't know what I'm clicking to actually be able to start the game. 

I hope the devs see these reviews and fix the game so it displays properly.

reviews.review_title: The game was good for one play but broke
reviews.review_description: The game was alright for the first play. I wanted to revisit it to play the DLC, but the most you will get on Meta now a days is a black screen. Avoid the hassle and don't buy it.

The main screen doesn't show up. It's there you just can't see it. You have to select blindly to get the game to start. Also the in game x button menu does the exact same thing. I would leave a 5 star review except I can't help feeling I'm missing out on so much more of the experience.

Great game with simple mechanics and silly humor. Unfortunately it's currently unplayable for me as I experienced a black screen after the game loads. I can hear sound, and even blindly load the level but the visuals stays pitch black. Any planned update on that?
This game is fun funny and on some Rick and morty vibe hahaha I love it

This is one of the best vr games ever. It has tons of awesome  hilarious humor that keeps you wanting to play the developers put a lot of time and effort into making this. Its such a fun non boring vr game it's a 10 out of 10 only issue is there's a black screen when you first load in and when you pause the game which makes it hard to collect collectables and see stats ext. I would recommend even with the black screen issue if your thinking about getting it but please fix the bug

If you like puzzle adventure platformer games, and the TV show Rick and Morty, you are going to love this game.

A must have!

Home screen is unavailable, unable to see menus while in the games. Every time I load the game I’m stuck at a point I can’t move on from. Don’t buy this game until they offer an update for the new quest models.

It was very great and fun, until one day the main menu is black screen. Very sad :(
I tried reinstalling the game, but it did not work.

reviews.review_title: Doesn’t work on the 3 - avoid it.
reviews.review_description: You see the splash screens then the menu is totally black. You can start the game, but the in game menus are also black, so it’s totally unplayable.
Yea no menu. It’s really sad because it’s a fun game. Very funny
Dont buy, cant even launch the game. How have the developers not patched the black screen??
I LOVE the game style and it’s a very unique gameplay style 100% worth $50
Since the last quest version. Game is not payable. Screen is black.
Played 1 hour and then Meta decided to break the game. Squanch Games, save us

Funniest game on Quest! A simple puzzle/story game with hilarious and outrageous characters and dialogue. Enjoyed every minute and laughed out loud! 

FYI - not suitable for children!! :)

If you happen to be a fan of Rick & Morty,this game is a must have. The story and comedy style is everything you would expect from the creators of Rick & Morty. Not only is it hilarious but it’s a solid platformer as well. The enemies will make fun of you and taunt you. Trover will give you sh*t about some of your decisions and complains about puzzles. You decisions can change certain aspects of the story and I often hang around to hear the different characters random dialogue. At one part in the game I stumbled across two enemies who were arguing,I wanted to listen to them argue and to my surprise,they ended up fighting each other. I’m around 2 hours into the game and I have enjoyed every minute of it. In other words,I highly recommend this game

reviews.review_title: One of the best games in VR so far!
reviews.review_description: This game is hilarious but it also showcases VR in the way I dreamed it would be like as a kid. In classic Justin Roiland style, prepare to enjoy the Rick and Morty adventure you've been waiting for. You won't regret it!

reviews.review_title: MUST HAVE FOR RICK AND MORTY FANS!!
reviews.review_description: This game is a big fat disgusting lactating 10/10. It's not too difficult, so it's pretty chill and has some hilarious voice lines. I completed this game the day after buying it cause it's so addicting and fun!
Very funny and very fun. This game is so well done that I’d put it in my top 100 games of all time after 40 years of gaming. I’ll be sad when it’s over.

Mislead me for sure don’t get me wrong I love Rick and morty but all I want is a refund and I am not going play the two hours needed to even have a chance for a refund might as well have gotten it on some low budget phone vr device now I’m forced to let it sit in my library
The green power babies helped me get jerked off!
I have to wait "10 minutes"
It deserves a 4 star if it didn't have huge bug on pauses and starting game
Cool

reviews.review_title: Must have for Rick and Morty fans
reviews.review_description: Very fun

This has got to be some kind of freaking joke there still has not been a Quest 3 enhanced update? The quest 3 had a premature launch clearly the headset should not have been released until holiday season 2024

reviews.review_title: One of the best games I have played…
reviews.review_description: I absolutely love this game. The inappropriate humour and general idiocy works really well. I just wish the developer would come out with some more of these kind of games.
Amazing game. Look forward to another from the developers.
I got the game to try and review and then I was going to refund the game and it says that I can't even check to refund I really just want to refund it please and thank you
And morty
So my friend gifted me this game and whenever I try to download it even though I have more than enough storage it says I don’t have enough storage. Can anyone help me with this?

reviews.review_title: Totally bummed!!!! This was so much fun
reviews.review_description:
I really loved this game and came back to replay it.  It says it’s for the quest 3, but it’s not.  The new controllers don’t work with the game.  A lot of people are making complaints about it too, but the company says they’re taking a break from vr.  I don’t know if this will ever be fixed, but what a disappointment .  Now I have this game that’s not playable past the first chapter.   It’s crazy because it was such a high quality game.  Why would they let it just die like this?

Old review -I was really hesitant about this one, but I’m happy I went for it.  It was a lot of fun.  I’m not really into violence (just a personal preference) but the ‘violence’ in this game was so unrealistic in a fancy way, that it never bothered me.  The character interaction with you as the player felt so natural.  I totally recommend this game!

I really hope there’s a sequel!!!
This used to work. Now it won’t load past the loading screen. What happened?
I’ve seen many reviews where they can’t get past the shroomia world wall. Happening to me too.
I bought the game and have tried multiple times to get it to boot up so I can play it but it won’t load

This game might be good for PSVR or maybe even PCVR but it is not good on quest. 

I really wanted to like this but this is the first game on Quest that I have had a real negative reaction to from the very beginning. 

Firstly and most importantly there is no smooth motion. I cannot play with jerky movements in VR, I want smooth locomotion. This kind of jerky movement might help alleviate motion sickness in VR for some people but personally it makes it worse for me. Having to turn at 45 degree angles and not be able to face the direction I want is a definite no for me and I think this is the first game I’ve played that doesn’t have the option for smooth locomotion. Even with that, it gets worse. 

There is no (or very little) controller tracking. 
You play as a character sitting in a chair who is holding a controller in his hands. Your character uses this controller to move another character. Regardless of where you move your hands, your character will always keep his two hands on his controller. This kills immersion and I’m really surprised something like this is even allowed to exist in the oculus store. You would be better just playing with a normal console controller. 

I see no reason or advantage as to why this is on VR. It is essentially a flat screen game. You move a character around in 3rd person as you would in a regular 3rd person game, except that the camera angle is fixed to your character who cannot move only teleport to fixed locations on the map. 

Sure the voices are great if you’re a fan of Rick and morty and their style, for me, it’s hit and miss and this is a bit more of a miss than a hit.

The game is very basic not very exciting and the teleporting movement is wack. 
And on top of that the characters and dialogue is annoying, maybe a middle school kid would think its funny or entertaining.
This game has a censored and uncensored setting. The censored setting is still terrible. They swear like crazy every third word. I’m sorry I bought it

I guess I'm the only one who thinks this game is 100% lousy. The script writing is terrible every other word is a F bomb, it's like no time or effort was put into the storyline or the way they recorded the voices. It really makes me wonder how this game got such good ratings? maybe the developers paid them off? The game play got stale after the first hour. I'm a big fan of raunchy comedy but some of  this stuff is just flat out weirdo business. I can't even begin to wrap my mind around anyone who would find this entertaining. It's extremely annoying when your trying to figure something out and the characters just start rambling nonstop. I feel bad for anyone who experiences this game for the first time on Oculus.  When you hear the characters talk it's like lessening to people who don't know what to say on the microphone.  I'll definitely think twice from now on before I buy a game by reading the ratings I totally didn't see this coming.
If you like rick and morty without the smart comments and references you will find it amusing, but i didn't and all i left is a smartphone  game on 3rd person vr.
Bullsht played for 1 hour and can't request a refund

I don't mind the cussing and story line.  You were warned.  I  am new to the VR world, so I went crazy buying games.   Being a R&M fan...   In the beginning if you couldn't get the puzzle it gave you another easier option.  I  wished they did that throughout the game. But, they don't.  I have to look up the process most the time on the net/utube. I banged my head on so many levels that I could not take it any more, I stopped playing.  I can't even remember the level I left, nor how to work the controls anymore.

Early in the game the puzzles are wayyyyy too hard. Figure out how to manage difficulty with a puzzle game so they are not extremely annoying to solve.

Tried it again. Couldn't get much past my previous attempt.

If I could have gotten a refund I definitely would have.  I realized that it was rated mature but I found the language to be unnecessarily offensive even in censored mode.  All censored mode seem to do was beep out the f word.  The use of god d*** was still in the censored version along with lots of other curse words.  I immediately uninstalled it.  I really wish I could remove it from my library.

I have no idea if it’s a bug or what but the wall you need to grab stones and put them in - I’ve been working on it for 6 hours!!! That’s ridiculous. 

The stones at the very top (above the ones moved in) seem to have bounding boxes further out from the actual stone so unless I land at the very edge of the stone I can’t get on it. It blocks me. Keep in mind that using a joystick vs a left right button makes it very difficult to be accurate. 

I legit am going to smash my headset. What a waste. I should not be stuck at this point in a game for that long. 

Love it until this part as it becomes unplayable.

reviews.review_title: It’s the best of the worst.
reviews.review_description: Yes the quest has weak graphics, overpriced with a terrible return policy that denies refunds at their discretion which is false refund advertisement and I’m not happy about the forced Facebook account. Graphics are just blobs. Colorful blobs. Terrible annoying voice that constantly talks.

Ok understand it's from the creators of Rick and Morty but your in a funking chair the whole time not even able to be the character that's fighting that was the down fall for me this is like a fourth person game I recommend you just go buy a extra large pizza and some wings...but this is just my opinion
This game is just so disappointing

I got this game ages ago and it's stuck in downloading/ installing ever side. After weeks of this crap inn startling to get a little pissed of. Headset is constantly on, connected to the internet and on the wire.
This game is sacrilegious.  Waste of money.

reviews.review_title: Writer: Child just learning to expletive
reviews.review_description: Don’t agree? Lvl up your linguistic skills, agree? Well you know what potential was wasted.
1 star for non crossbuy games :)

reviews.review_title: Must buy for R&M fans, but not for Quest
reviews.review_description:
Edit: Everything I said about this game previously still stands, but people should know the Quest version does not get the free DLCs that every other platform has been getting. This means you should by on Steam if you can. I wish I would not have bought the Quest version....
I was holding off on this because I do not care for platformers, but I bought it on sale, and I am so glad I did. The game instantly had me lmao with tears running down my face, plus the gameplay mechanic makes especially good use of VR. It is so much better than I expected, and I really didn't want to put it down to go to sleep. It is almost like being in a Rick and Morty episode. I highly recommend this game as long as you have a tolerance for a more twisted sense of humor, because if not your head might explode...I mean your mind might be blown ;-)

reviews.review_title: I WISH THE DEVS COULD HELP ME GET A REFU
reviews.review_description:
Honestly I tried this game for the devs, and it wasn’t a game that’s my style. A videogame that’s takes advantage of the vr, is not a vr immersion game.
Please help get me a refund...

Even as a true Rick and Morty fan there is no reason to justify the price on this.

I cant play the game because the curser is too high to interact I cant recenter it to my face. I would love to play this game but i have to look so far down to interact with stuff its blurry and i cant see anything
Absolutely disgusting. This garbage is NOT funny. Satanic. You collect the souls of babies... I can’t make this garbage up how it’s making the whole Epstein Beast System a joke.

reviews.review_title: Have a bugs and doesn’t work movement
reviews.review_description: Yesterday I bought this game and tried, but game doesn’t following my control to move forward. I have requested refund after 40 min trying game. Please fix the bugs or return me my money
